name: Rapid Fire
tip: Add $1 additional attack dice if the target is within half range.

name: Sustained Hits
tip: Each Critical Hit scores $1 additional hit(s) on the target.

name: Melta
tip: Within half range, add $1 to this weapon's Damage characteristic.

name: Anti-keyword
tip: Against $1 units, an unmodified Wound roll of $2+ is a Critical Wound.

name: Devastating Wounds
tip: A Critical Wound ends the attack sequence and inflicts mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic — at most one model can be damaged per Critical Wound; excess is lost.

name: Lethal Hits
tip: On a Critical Hit, you can choose to automatically wound the target — no Wound roll is made.

name: Twin-linked
tip: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

name: Indirect Fire
tip: Can shoot units not visible to the bearer (indirect shooting): the target has the benefit of cover, Hit rolls cannot be re-rolled, and an unmodified Hit roll of 1–5 fails (1–3 if the unit Remained Stationary and a friendly unit can see the target).

name: Ignores Cover
tip: The target cannot have the benefit of cover against attacks with this weapon.

name: Torrent
tip: This weapon automatically hits its target — no Hit roll is made.

name: Heavy
tip: In your Shooting phase, add 1 to the Hit roll if the bearer's unit is unengaged, was not set up this turn, and no model in it has moved more than 3" this turn.

name: Blast X
tip: Add $1 additional attack dice for every 5 models in the target unit (rounding down).

name: Blast
tip: Add 1 additional attack dice for every 5 models in the target unit (rounding down).

name: Cleave
tip: If all of this weapon's attacks target a single unit, add $1 additional attack dice for every 5 models in that unit (rounding down).

name: Hazardous
tip: After the bearer's unit finishes its attacks, make one hazard roll per Hazardous weapon used: on a 1–2, the unit suffers 1 mortal wound (3 if every model is a Monster or Vehicle).

name: Close-quarters
tip: The bearer's unit can shoot this weapon while engaged (close-quarters shooting), targeting the units it is engaged with.

name: Pistol
tip: Identical to [CLOSE-QUARTERS]: the bearer's unit can shoot this weapon while engaged, targeting the units it is engaged with.

name: Assault
tip: The bearer's unit can shoot after Advancing (assault shooting), but can then only attack with its Assault weapons.

name: Lance
tip: Add 1 to the Wound roll if the bearer's unit made a Charge move this turn.

name: One Shot
tip: This weapon can only be selected to make attacks once per battle.

name: Extra Attacks
tip: The bearer makes attacks with this weapon in addition to one of its other melee weapons.

name: Precision
tip: If the target unit contains a Character visible to the attackers, these attacks can be allocated to that Character's allocation group.

name: Psychic
tip: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this attack's BS/WS and to the Hit roll. Counts as a psychic attack.
